title: D-Sides Creeper
description: A mod adding the Lurker, a d-sides version of the Creeper based on a concept created by Agente R.
body:
This mod adds a new mob, the Lurker. The Lurker is a Creeper-like mob that spawns rarely in Lush Caves, it will dig itself into the ground, then emerge when the player comes near. The Lurker drops Lurker Fragments, which can be used to craft landmines and bombs. The mod requires **Geckolib Utils**.


<details>
<summary>TLDR Additions</summary>

- Lurker (Mob)
- Lurker Fragment (Item)
- Landmine (Block)
- Bomb (Item)

</details>

![The original concept, created by Agente R](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25821affa4e190c756cf0f28915cb8339c0bd25c.png)

[The original concept, created by Agente R](https://x.com/Agente_R_XD/status/1766710275401556051)

**Thank you Noobaki, for making the profile art!**
